api_errors.email_required: Must provide email to login/create user

api_errors.no_login_request: No login requested for this email
api_errors.invalid_pin: This PIN is invalid or has expired

api_errors.delete_venue_forbidden: Only the venue owner can delete it
api_errors.confirmation_venue_mismatch: Confirmation name does not match venue name
api_errors.update_channel_forbidden: Only owners can update the channel
api_errors.confirmation_channel_mismatch: Confirmation name does not match channel name

api_errors.create_invite_forbidden: You are not allowed to create invites.
api_errors.already_member: You are already a member of this venue

api_errors.set_venue_role_forbidden: Insufficient permissions to set venue roles
api_errors.admin_role_limit: Admins can only assign Moderator or Member roles
api_errors.target_user_not_found: Target user not found in venue
api_errors.block_user_forbidden: Only venue Admins or Owners can block users
api_errors.target_user_not_in_venue: Target user is not in this venue
api_errors.unblock_user_forbidden: Only venue Admins or Owners can unblock users
api_errors.manage_templates_forbidden: Only channel owners/admins or venue owners can manage templates
api_errors.not_member_short: You are not a member of this venue.
api_errors.blocked_from_sending: You are blocked in this venue and cannot send messages.
api_errors.send_message_forbidden: Only Moderators and above can send messages.
api_errors.delete_message_forbidden: You can only delete your own messages, or must be a channel admin/moderator/venue owner.
api_errors.member_of_venue_required: You are not a member of this venue.
api_errors.blocked_in_venue: You are blocked in this venue.
api_errors.repeat_message_forbidden: Only Moderators and above can repeat messages.

api_errors.messenger_device_mismatch: Messenger device not paired with this venue or identity mismatch

api_errors.rename_node_forbidden: Only venue owners or channel admins can rename display nodes
api_errors.unpair_node_forbidden: Only the registered device identity can unpair itself.
